common.app_subtitle: Turn 'I don't understand' into 'I got it!'

login.login_error_message: Login failed. Please check your email and password.

signup.signup_error_message: Registration failed. Please check your input.

decompose.decompose_title: Tell me what you don't understand!
decompose.decompose_subtitle: Upload text or an image, and AI will gently break it down for you.
decompose.input_placeholder: Enter what you don't understand here. E.g., "What does this Kanji mean?"
decompose.decompose_success_message: Great job! AI has finished decomposing. Ready for new discoveries?
decompose.decompose_error_generic: Oops, it seems I couldn't decompose that this time. Please try with different words or an image!
decompose.decompose_info_message: AI is starting the decomposition. Please wait a moment!
